positive: A symmetrical and intricately detailed illustration of mystical celestial flora. The composition must feature highly stylized, glowing bioluminescent leaves, cosmic vines, and crescent moon motifs intertwining with abstract geometric star paths. The aesthetic should blend the elegance of Art Nouveau linework with the crispness of modern scientific engraving. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, luminous gold, emerald green, and creamy white. Focus on strong contrast and perfect negative space, achieving a perfect silhouette. Flat, graphic design quality, suitable for large-scale apparel printing, central and balanced composition.
